TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tatama, salengacay ku banges, nalecuhan i 3 a bulad 17 a demiad, 1959 a mihcan. u miunduay. Danny Ainge unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u mikilac zikuzay mimaliay. Danny Ainge i 1981 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 31, namapili' tu nu Boston Celtics putiput.
S.PHON: tatama, sar~ɾəŋaʦaj ku baŋəs, nar~ɾəʦuħan i * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦan. u miunduaj. dannj aiŋə unu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u mikir~ɾaʦ zikuzaj mimar~ɾiaj. dannj aiŋə i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu boston ʦər~ɾtiʦs putiput.
S.FORM: tatama, salengacay ku banges, nalecuhan i 3 a bulad 17 a demiad, 1959 a mihcan. u miunduay. Danny Ainge unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u mikilac zikuzay mimaliay. Danny Ainge i 1981 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 31, namapili' tu nu Boston Celtics putiput.
S.PHON: tatama, sar~ɾəŋaʦaj ku baŋəs, nar~ɾəʦuħan i * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦan. u miunduaj. dannj aiŋə unu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u mikir~ɾaʦ zikuzaj mimar~ɾiaj. dannj aiŋə i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu boston ʦər~ɾtiʦs putiput.
